professionalSummary: London-based Senior Software Engineer with a decade of expertise in the UK fintech and e-commerce sectors. Highly skilled in the full Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), with a particular focus on bridging Backend Engineering and DevOps. Expert in building resilient GitLab CI/CD pipelines and automating cloud infrastructure on AWS/GCP to drive rapid, secure delivery cycles.

responsibilities: Architected the migration of the core UK lending platform to a microservices architecture on AWS EKS, achieving 99.99% uptime.
Managed a cross-functional team of 8 engineers, fostering a 'DevSecOps' culture that prioritised security and automation.
Engineered zero-downtime deployment strategies (Blue/Green & Canary) using AWS CodeDeploy and Route53.
Designed and implemented a comprehensive GitLab CI/CD framework from scratch, automating the build-test-deploy cycle for 40+ microservices.
Integrated 'Security-as-Code' into pipelines using Snyk for dependency scanning and SonarQube for static code analysis, reducing vulnerabilities by 60%.
Automated the provisioning of AWS environments (VPC, Subnets, RDS) using Terraform, ensuring 100% environment parity between Staging and Production.
Developed custom GitLab CI templates and 'include' files to standardise pipelines across multiple engineering teams, reducing onboarding time for new services from days to hours.
Utilised Kaniko for secure, rootless Docker image builds within the GitLab runners, pushing to Amazon ECR.
Developed RESTful Java services for a high-traffic e-commerce aggregator, handling peaks of 5k requests per second.
Collaborated on the initial containerisation of legacy services, moving from bare-metal servers to Dockerised environments.

relevantCourseWork: Distributed Systems, Cloud Infrastructure Automation, Cyber Security
